name: Text Summarization Benchmark v1
description: Tests summarization agents for entity preservation, numerical accuracy, and structural output quality.
sourceDescription: All input texts and expected outputs are synthetic. Tests focus on whether summaries preserve key entities and facts from the source text.

tests.description: Single sentence summary of short text

body.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. It was a sunny day. The fox was hungry.
Apple Inc. announced the iPhone 16 on September 9, 2024. CEO Tim Cook presented the device at Apple Park in Cupertino.

Climate change is one of the most pressing issues of our time. Global temperatures have risen by approximately 1.1 degrees Celsius since the pre-industrial era. The Paris Agreement of 2015 set a goal to limit warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. However, current pledges put the world on track for roughly 2.7 degrees of warming by 2100. Scientists warn that exceeding 1.5 degrees could trigger irreversible tipping points, including ice sheet collapse and Amazon rainforest dieback.
Tesla reported Q3 2024 revenue of $25.18 billion, a 7.8% increase year-over-year. Net income reached $2.17 billion. The company delivered 462,890 vehicles during the quarter.
